description: lem â€” a verified package manager for Dafny (bundles its own pinned Dafny+Z3)
notes: lem carries its own pinned Dafny+Z3 under its install dir and uses it internally;
your PATH and any other Dafny install are left untouched. Set $env:LEM_DAFNY to override.
Run 'lem doctor' to confirm the toolchain is resolved.
